CREATE TABLE domains (id UInt32, domain String);
SELECT idnaDecode(domain) FROM domains WHERE id = 1;
SELECT idnaDecode(domain) AS decoded_domain FROM domains WHERE id > 0;
SELECT id, idnaDecode(domain) FROM domains WHERE domain LIKE 'xn--%';
SELECT id, idnaDecode(CONCAT(domain, '.com')) AS full_domain FROM domains;
SELECT idnaDecode(domain) FROM domains WHERE domain IN (SELECT domain FROM domains WHERE id = 2);
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT id, idnaDecode(domain) FROM domains;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results WHERE idnaDecode(domain) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, idnaDecode(domain) AS decoded_domain FROM domains WHERE LENGTH(domain) < 20;
SELECT idnaDecode(id) FROM (SELECT id, domain FROM domains WHERE id = 1) AS subquery;
